name: Naval Missiles, Ramming, and Shearing
description: Missile and catapult fire as CHAINMAIL; catapult hits wear ships down — large ships take 18-24 points, small 9-15, boats 3 — and sink them at zero. Rams (mast lowered, Fast speed, backing oars after striking) deal 10-60% damage with 25% to hole below the waterline (sink in 3-18 turns unless patched: 5 turns × 10 men, 25% to fail and need 5 more); side rams kill 20% of crew (15% rowers), bow or stern 5% (no rowers); ramming leaves grappling intact. Passing alongside shears oars — half the rowers on that side die, mutually for two rowed ships unless oars are shipped by order; sheared ships lie dead 3 turns then at half speed, twice sheared they row no more.
